groceries.note: home cooking; Montenegro food costs mid-range

diningOut.note: restaurants along waterfront; tourist premium in season

transit.note: limited local bus; may need scooter/car

coworking.note: limited coworking; coliving spaces €555–€830/mo incl. workspace

accomSeasonality._doc: 12 monthly multipliers for RENT ONLY (Jan..Dec). 1.0 = base. Coastal city peaks strongly Jun–Aug.

evidence.claim: 1BR Kotor area from €600/mo; coliving spaces €555–€830 incl. utilities and workspace
evidence.quote: Private rooms in coliving spaces range from €555-830 ($600-900) per month, including utilities, fast internet, and shared workspaces

evidence.claim: coastal towns like Kotor cost 20–40% more in summer; rents can double in high season
evidence.quote: In coastal cities like Budva or Kotor, rents can double in high season. Coastal towns like Budva and Kotor cost 20–40% more in summer

evidence.claim: comfortable single person budget €1,400–€1,800/mo in Kotor/Budva area
evidence.quote: In Budva or Kotor, budget €1,400–€1,800 for a single person living comfortably

evidence.claim: long-term rental listings Kotor: Kavač €500/mo, sea view Škaljari €700/mo
evidence.quote: Long-term rental listings for 1-bedroom apartments in Kotor range from €500 to €700 per month
